title: sanger-tol/blobtoolkit pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be unique, cannot contain spaces, and is required when specimen/run are not provided

specimen.errorMessage: Specimen cannot contain spaces, is required when sample is not provided, and must be unique in combination with run

run.errorMessage: Run cannot contain spaces, is required when sample is not provided, and must be unique in combination with specimen

datatype.errorMessage: Data type must be one of: 'hic' or 'illumina' or 'ont' or 'pacbio'

datafile.errorMessage: Data file for reads cannot contain spaces and must be BAM/CRAM/FASTQ/FASTA

library_layout.errorMessage: The only valid layouts are SINGLE and PAIRED
